Write a TLA+ specification for the following:

A two-phase commit protocol with one coordinator and N participants. The coordinator decides to commit only if all participants vote yes.
I'll write a well-formed TLA+ specification with proper Init, Next, and invariants.

---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Coordinator,
  Participants

ASSUME
  Coordinator \notin Participants

VARIABLES
  coordinatorState,
  participantStates

CoordinatorStates == {"INIT", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}
ParticipantStates == {"INIT", "YES", "NO", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}

Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "INIT"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "INIT"]

Vote ==
  \E p \in Participants :
    /\ participantStates[p] = "INIT"
    /\ \E vote \in {"YES", "NO"} :
         participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = vote]
    /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

CoordinatorDecision ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "INIT"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "YES"
  /\ coordinatorState' = "COMMIT"
  /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

AbortDecision ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "INIT"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "NO"
  /\ coordinatorState' = "ABORT"
  /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

Commit ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "COMMIT"
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
       participantStates[p] = "YES"
       /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMIT"]
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

Abort ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "ABORT"
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
       participantStates[p] = "NO"
       /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORT"]
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

Next ==
  Vote
  \/ CoordinatorDecision
  \/ AbortDecision
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates>> /\ <> (coordinatorState \in {"COMMIT", "ABORT"})

TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in CoordinatorStates
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> ParticipantStates]

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----

  Readers, Writers

  /\ Readers /= {}
  /\ Writers /= {}

VARIABLES
  readers, writers, lock

vars == <<readers, writers, lock>>

Init ==
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writers = {}
  /\ lock = 0

ReaderEnter(r) ==
  /\ r \in Readers
  /\ r \notin readers
  /\ lock > 0
  /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED writers
  /\ lock' = lock

ReaderExit(r) ==
  /\ r \in Readers
  /\ r \in readers
  /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED writers
  /\ lock' = lock

WriterEnter(w) ==
  /\ w \in Writers
  /\ w \notin writers
  /\ lock = 0
  /\ writers' = writers \cup {w}
  /\ lock' = 1

WriterExit(w) ==
  /\ w \in Writers
  /\ w \in writers
  /\ writers' = writers \ {w}
  /\ lock' = 0

Next ==
  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderEnter(r)
  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderExit(r)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterEnter(w)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterExit(w)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
  /\ readers \subseteq Readers
  /\ writers \subseteq Writers
  /\ lock \in 0..1

CONSTANTS
  Readers,
  Writers

ASSUME
  /\ Readers /= {}
  /\ Writers /= {}

VARIABLE
  state,
  readersWaiting,
  writersWaiting

State == {"Free", "Reading", "Writing"}

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in State
  /\ readersWaiting \subseteq Readers
  /\ writersWaiting \subseteq Writers

Init ==
  /\ state = "Free"
  /\ readersWaiting = {}
  /\ writersWaiting = {}

  /\ r \in Readers
  /\ state \in {"Free", "Reading"}
  /\ state' = "Reading"
  /\ readersWaiting' = readersWaiting \ {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED writersWaiting

Write(w) ==
  /\ w \in Writers
  /\ state = "Free"
  /\ state' = "Writing"
  /\ UNCHANGED readersWaiting
  /\ writersWaiting' = writersWaiting \ {w}

ReaderDone(r) ==
  /\ r \in Readers
  /\ state = "Reading"
  /\ state' = IF readersWaiting = {} THEN "Free" ELSE "Reading"
  /\ UNCHANGED readersWaiting
  /\ UNCHANGED writersWaiting

WriterDone(w) ==
  /\ w \in Writers
  /\ state = "Writing"
  /\ state' = IF readersWaiting = {} THEN "Free" ELSE "Reading"
  /\ UNCHANGED readersWaiting
  /\ UNCHANGED writersWaiting

Next ==
  \/ \E r \in Readers : Read(r)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : Write(w)
  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderDone(r)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterDone(w)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, readersWaiting, writersWaiting>> /\ TypeOK

ReaderRelease(r) ==

WriterRelease(w) ==

  /\ writers' = writers \ {w}
  /\ lock' = "free"
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderRelease(r)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterAcquire(w)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterRelease(w)

Write a TLA+ specification for the following:

A read-write lock allowing multiple concurrent readers but exclusive writer access. Writers wait for all readers to finish.
I'll write a well-formed TLA+ specification with proper Init, Next, and invariants.

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Readers,
  Writers

ASSUME
  /\ Readers /= {}
  /\ Writers /= {}
  /\ Readers \cap Writers = {}

VARIABLES
  readers,
  writers,
  lock

TypeOK ==
  /\ readers \in SUBSET Readers
  /\ writers \in SUBSET Writers
  /\ lock \in {"free", "locked"}

Init ==
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writers = {}
  /\ lock = "free"

ReaderAcquire(r) ==
  /\ r \in Readers
  /\ r \notin readers
  /\ lock = "free"
  /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED << writers, lock >>

ReaderRelease(r) ==
  /\ r \in readers
  /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED << writers, lock >>

WriterAcquire(w) ==
  /\ w \in Writers
  /\ w \notin writers
  /\ lock = "free"
  /\ lock' = "locked"
  /\ writers' = writers \cup {w}
  /\ UNCHANGED << readers >>

WriterRelease(w) ==
  /\ w \in writers
  /\ writers' = writers \ {w}
  /\ lock' = "free"
  /\ UNCHANGED << readers >>

Next ==
  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderAcquire(r)
  \/ \E r \in Readers : ReaderRelease(r)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterAcquire(w)
  \/ \E w \in Writers : WriterRelease(w)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writers, lock>>

/\ victim' = P2

---- MODULE BoundedStack ----

VARIABLES

  top

vars == <<stack, top>>

Next == \/ \E v \in 1..MaxSize : Push(v)
       \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ stack \in [1..MaxSize -> 0..MaxSize]
          /\ top \in 0..MaxSize

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  BufferSize,  -- Size of the bounded FIFO queue
  ItemType     -- Type of items in the queue

ASSUME
  BufferSize \in Nat /\ BufferSize > 0

  buffer,  -- List representing the FIFO queue
  prodIdx, -- Index of the next item to produce
  consIdx  -- Index of the next item to consume

vars == <<buffer, prodIdx, consIdx>>

-- Helper functions

IsEmpty == Len(buffer) = 0

-- Producer action: add an item to the queue
Produce(item) == /\ ~IsFull
                /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, item)
                /\ prodIdx' = prodIdx + 1
                /\ UNCHANGED consIdx

-- Consumer action: remove an item from the queue
Consume == /\ ~IsEmpty
           /\ buffer' = SubSeq(buffer, 2, Len(buffer))
           /\ consIdx' = consIdx + 1
           /\ UNCHANGED prodIdx

-- Initialization: empty queue, indices at 0

        /\ prodIdx = 0
        /\ consIdx = 0

-- Next-state relation: either produce or consume

          /\ consIdx \in Nat
          /\ prodIdx <= BufferSize
          /\ consIdx <= BufferSize

-- Specification: system starts in Init and evolves according to Next
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-- Safety property: the queue never overflows or underflows
Safety == TypeOK

Liveness == WF_vars(Consume)

---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS
  Capacity,
  Elem

VARIABLES
  queue,
  producerBlocked,
  consumerBlocked

ASSUME
  Capacity \in Nat /\ Capacity > 0

TypeOK ==
  /\ queue \in Seq(Elem)
  /\ Len(queue) <= Capacity
  /\ producerBlocked \in BOOLEAN
  /\ consumerBlocked \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
  /\ queue = << >>
  /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
  /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE

ProducerAction ==
  /\ ~producerBlocked
  /\ Len(queue) < Capacity
  /\ queue' = Append(queue, Elem)
  /\ consumerBlocked' = FALSE

ConsumerAction ==
  /\ ~consumerBlocked
  /\ Len(queue) > 0
  /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
  /\ producerBlocked' = FALSE

ProducerBlockedAction ==
  /\ ~producerBlocked
  /\ Len(queue) = Capacity
  /\ producerBlocked' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED consumerBlocked

ConsumerBlockedAction ==
  /\ ~consumerBlocked
  /\ Len(queue) = 0
  /\ consumerBlocked' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED producerBlocked

Next ==
  \/ ProducerAction
  \/ ConsumerAction

---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Capacity,
  Producer,
  Consumer

ASSUME
  Capacity \in Nat
  /\ Producer \in {0, 1}
  /\ Consumer \in {0, 1}
  /\ Producer # Consumer

VARIABLES
  queue,
  head,
  tail

vars == <<queue, head, tail>>

Init == /\ queue = {}
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

ProducerAction == /\ head < Capacity
        /\ queue' = queue \cup {head}
        /\ head' = head + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED tail

ConsumerAction == /\ head > tail
        /\ queue' = queue \ {tail}
        /\ tail' = tail + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED head

Next == IF Producer = 0 THEN ProducerAction ELSE ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ queue \subseteq 0..Capacity-1
        /\ head \in 0..Capacity
        /\ tail \in 0..Capacity

A two-phase commit protocol with one coordinator and N participants. The coordinator decides to commit only if all participants vote yes.
I'll write a well-formed TLA+ specification with proper Init, Next, and invariants.

---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Coordinator,
  Participants

ASSUME
  Coordinator \notin Participants

VARIABLES
  coordinatorState,
  participantStates,
  decision

COORDINATOR_STATES == {"INIT", "WAITING", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}
PARTICIPANT_STATES == {"INIT", "VOTING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
DECISIONS == {"COMMIT", "ABORT"}

Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "INIT"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "INIT"]
  /\ decision = "COMMIT"

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "INIT"
     /\ coordinatorState' = "WAITING"
     /\ UNCHANGED << participantStates, decision >>
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "WAITING"
     /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "INIT"
     /\ LET p == CHOOSE p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "INIT" IN
        /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "VOTING"]
        /\ coordinatorState' = "WAITING"
        /\ decision' = "COMMIT"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "WAITING"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING"
     /\ decision' = "ABORT"
     /\ coordinatorState' = "ABORT"
     /\ UNCHANGED participantStates
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "WAITING"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING"
     /\ decision' = "COMMIT"
     /\ coordinatorState' = "COMMIT"
     /\ UNCHANGED participantStates
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "COMMIT"
     /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING"
     /\ LET p == CHOOSE p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING" IN
        /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMITTED"]
        /\ coordinatorState' = "COMMIT"
        /\ decision' = "COMMIT"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "ABORT"
     /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING"
     /\ LET p == CHOOSE p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VOTING" IN
        /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED"]
        /\ coordinatorState' = "ABORT"
        /\ decision' = "ABORT"

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, decision>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in COORDINATOR_STATES
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> PARTICIPANT_STATES]
  /\ decision \in DECISIONS

A gossip (epidemic) protocol where N nodes periodically share updates. A node that receives an update marks it as 'infected' and spreads it in subsequent rounds.

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  N,          \* Number of nodes
  ROUNDS      \* Number of rounds

VARIABLES
  infected,   \* Set of infected nodes
  round       \* Current round

vars == << infected, round >>

Init == 
  /\ infected = {}
  /\ round = 1

Next == 
  /\ round <= ROUNDS
  /\ IF infected # {}
     THEN 
       \* Each infected node shares its infection with a random node
       /\ infected' = infected \cup { CHOOSE i \in 1..N : i \notin infected }
     ELSE 
       /\ infected' = infected
  /\ round' = round + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ round \in 1..ROUNDS+1
  /\ infected \subseteq 1..N

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES
  allocated,
  nextPage

PageSet == 1..N

AllocatedPages == {p \in PageSet : allocated[p] = TRUE}

NextPage == IF nextPage \in PageSet THEN nextPage ELSE 1

Init == /\ allocated = [p \in PageSet |-> FALSE]
        /\ nextPage = 1

Next == /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![NextPage] = TRUE]
        /\ nextPage' = IF NextPage = N THEN 1 ELSE NextPage + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<allocated, nextPage>>

TypeOK == /\ allocated \in [PageSet -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ nextPage \in PageSet \cup {1}
